历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for Physics Category was approximately 10015 → 11255 → 11592 → 19075 → 16379. In 2024, due to adjustments in major groups, there was a significant drop (19075), and in 2025 it rebounded to 16379, showing considerable fluctuation in recent two years. The baseline for 2025 is about 16379. The provincial Physics Category enrollment plan was stable at 87 from 2021 to 2024, increased to 94 in 2025, and is planned at 96 for 2026, a slight expansion of 2 students (+2.1%) compared to 2025, with limited impact on easing competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 985, 211, Double First-Class; ranked approximately 38th in the 2026 Soft Science Main Ranking, stable in the 36–39 range in recent years, belonging to the upper-middle tier of 985 universities. During the 2025 college entrance examination cycle, there was somewhat negative public opinion due to an internship safety incident, while in the 2026 cycle, reputation evaluation turned neutral/mixed (campus controversy). Overall Douyin popularity ranking is 82nd, rated as 'average', with low exposure on short video platforms and no significant warming signal in application attention. Control Science and Engineering A+, Computer Science and Technology A, Software Engineering A-, Metallurgical Engineering A, Mechanical Engineering A-, Materials Science and Engineering A-, totaling 6 disciplines at A- or above, with strong engineering strength, exerting strong appeal for related major applications.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Majors such as Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication, Electrical Engineering, etc., continue to be highly recommended in society. In 2026, the total number of regular college entrance examination takers in Jiangsu Province is about 521,000, a significant increase from 2025, with an estimated 379,000 Physics Category examinees (an increase of about 45.5% from 2025), leading to markedly intensified competition. Northeastern University is located in Shenyang, Liaoning, far from Jiangsu. In terms of regional preference, Jiangsu examinees tend to favor universities in the Yangtze River Delta, so cross-province application heat remains relatively stable.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the 2025 baseline ranking of 16379, a slight enrollment expansion of 2 students (+2.1%) in 2026, a substantial increase of about 45.5% in Physics Category examinees in Jiangsu Province, and a neutral/stable reputation, the expansion of the examinee pool is the most critical factor driving the ranking downward, with the expansion's mitigating effect limited. It is predicted that the minimum ranking for Physics Category in 2026 will be approximately 16788, with a range of 16288–17288.

When applying, you should combine personal interests with your ranking to make a reasonable match.
